void __sanitizer_cov_trace_pc_guard (uint32_t * guard)

Definition at line 9 of file instrument_cov.c.

9                                                      {
10   if (guard == NULL || *guard == 0U) {
11     return;
12   }
13 
14   asciichat_instr_log_pc((uintptr_t)__builtin_return_address(0));
15 }




References asciichat_instr_log_pc().






void
  __sanitizer_cov_trace_pc_guard_init (uint32_t * start, uint32_t *
  stop)


Definition at line 17 of file instrument_cov.c.


17                                                                           {
18   if (start == NULL || stop == NULL || start == stop) {
19     return;
20   }
21 
22   if (*start != 0U) {
23     return;
24   }
25 
26   uint32_t counter = 1U;
27   for (uint32_t *it = start; it < stop; ++it) {
28     if (*it == 0U) {
29       *it = counter++;
30     }
31   }
32 }
